# #1699 - [CI] Enabling rocthrust tests for windows

---

Currently, the rocthrust `CTestTestfile.cmake` has this:

```
# This is a test file generated by rocThrust for install time.
# It differs slightly from the default testfile, and you may encounter issues because of that.
add_test(address_stability.hip "../address_stability.hip")
add_test(adjacent_difference.hip "../adjacent_difference.hip")
add_test(advance.hip "../advance.hip")
add_test(alignment.hip "../alignment.hip")
add_test(allocator.hip "../allocator.hip")
add_test(allocator_aware_policies.hip "../allocator_aware_policies.hip")
add_test(async_copy.hip "../async_copy.hip")
add_test(async_for_each.hip "../async_for_each.hip")
add_test(async_reduce.hip "../async_reduce.hip")
add_test(async_reduce_into.hip "../async_reduce_into.hip")
add_test(async_scan.hip "../async_scan.hip")
add_test(async_sort.hip "../async_sort.hip")
add_test(async_transform.hip "../async_transform.hip")
add_test(binary_search.hip "../binary_search.hip")
add_test(binary_search_descending.hip "../binary_search_descending.hip")
add_test(binary_search_vector.hip "../binary_search_vector.hip")
add_test(binary_search_vector_descending.hip "../binary_search_vector_descending.hip")
add_test(caching_allocator.hip "../caching_allocator.hip")
add_test(complex.hip "../complex.hip")
```
except, those files are nowhere to be found:
```
159/165 Test #159: zip_function.hip ..................................***Not Run   0.00 sec
        Start 160: zip_iterator.hip
Could not find executable ../zip_iterator.hip
```

The files should be included in the [toml](https://github.com/ROCm/TheRock/blob/21b40919154d8bc44bbbc0f951df7e0c45bda6fb/math-libs/artifact-prim.toml#L35)

repro steps:
```
$ git clone https://github.com/ROCm/TheRock.git
$ cd TheRock
$ python3 build_tools/install_rocm_from_artifacts.py --run-id 18236642711 --amdgpu-family gfx1151 --tests --prim
$ cd therock-build/bin
$ cd rocthrust
$ ctest
```
